data.change_summary: No additional code edits were required in this round. The prior implementation already satisfied the approved review for bead-to-task run linkage, so I left the code unchanged and revalidated the milestone-record path.
outstanding_risks: Task-run completion still updates lineage, snapshot, and journal files separately, so a crash between writes could leave those artifacts temporarily inconsistent until repaired.

steps.description: Reviewed the approved validation output and confirmed there were no follow-up amendments or requested fixes to apply for the milestone task-run lineage changes.
Revalidated the existing implementation with formatting, milestone_record unit tests, and clippy without making further code changes.
